rationale: Both candidates independently found the latent gap — the leftover get_cache_scale call in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py:2238 — and both raised the same substantive test-coverage critique (delegated-loader test never exercises the real AutoWeightsLoader mapping path), closely mirroring the ground truth's non-blocking note. X frames the diffusion-transformer gap as an actionable blocker with a concrete fix (migrate + add to _STALE_API_FILES) and even ties it to PR #4808/#4891 matching the ground truth's coordination note, giving it an edge in recall/actionability; Y is better grounded (cites actual vLLM source lines) and avoids X's one shaky/self-contradictory minor finding about the AutoWeightsLoader comment, giving it higher precision but a softer, non-blocking framing of the key gap that undersells its real severity.
